candidate_summary:
Name: Gal Lifshitz
Location preference: Israel
Open to remote: True
Target roles (profile): Junior Backend Developer, IT Support, SOC Analyst
Seniority: junior
Years of experience (est.): 1
Recent titles: Technical Support Specialist, Python Programming Tutor
Companies: Comax Smart ERP, Tel Hai University
Education: B.Sc. — Computer Science
Skills: Python, SQL, React, React Native, Angular, Node.js, FastAPI, Laravel, SQLAlchemy, WebSockets, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase, SQLite, AWS, Git, CI/CD, Machine Learning, LLM, Generative AI, Artificial Intelligence, Large Language Models, Networking, TCP/IP, Cybersecurity, ERP, Problem Solving, collaboration, Expo
Strengths: Hands-on experience in software development, Strong troubleshooting skills, Proficient in SQL analysis, Experience with cloud-based systems, Collaborative team player, Passionate about cybersecurity technologies
Summary: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in software development, production troubleshooting, SQL analysis, and cloud-based systems. Experienced in building backend applications with Python and FastAPI, investigating complex technical issues through log analysis and network diagnostics, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable solutions. Passionate about software engineering, system monitoring, and cybersecurity technologies.
Projects: Capstone Project Lead – Tribe Platform: Designed backend architecture using FastAPI, SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL. Implemented CRUD services, validation logic and relational data models. Built WebSocket-based real-time activity updates and participation tracking. Integrated Generative AI for automatic event image generation. Deployed cloud infrastructure using AWS and implemented automated integration testing with pytest.; Server Monitor System: Developed a server monitoring platform for tracking service availability and system health. Built RESTful APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for monitoring data management. Implemented concurrent HTTP, FTP and SSH health checks using ThreadPoolExecutor. Designed monitoring history and incident-tracking data models for proactive issue detection.; Capsto

career_notes: Gal should focus on roles that leverage his backend development skills while also considering opportunities in IT support and cybersecurity. Gaining experience with Docker and other cloud technologies will enhance his profile.

best_fit_roles.reason: Gal has relevant experience in backend development using Python and FastAPI, making him a strong fit for this role.
His background as a Technical Support Specialist aligns well with this role, leveraging his troubleshooting skills.
Gal's passion for cybersecurity and knowledge of networking make him a suitable candidate for this role.
